creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 203586
Patch to upgrade the ports script to support cliqz-1.26.0 builds.

Cliqz has been updated from version 1.25.3 to 1.26.0.

I have made a patch that makes changes to the ports script to support building cliqz-1.26.0.

Notes about the patch

* Removes files/patch-bug1519629 , files/patch-bug1519729 , files/patch-bug1532851
since these are no longer applicable to the 1.26.0
* Adds files/patch-magic__build__and__package.sh to disable building of tests since they are not required.
* Added comments to the header of the patch files/patch-cliqz__env.sh

It would be nice if the patch can be applied to the ports tree of FreeBSD.

Thank you
Santhosh
